    @FilterType nvarchar(32),
    @IsPaged bit
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Worker procedure for route: EmailUnpaged
    -- Conditions: FilterTypeAxis = 'Email' AND PagingAxis = 'false'

    -- TODO: Implement specialized query logic

    SELECT
        UserId int NOT NULL,
        DisplayName nvarchar(200) NOT NULL
    WHERE 1 = 0;
END
GO
